creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Torsten Zühlsdorff from comment #7)
I agree in principal.

Note however that quarterly branches are supported until the next quarterly branch is cut, and the 2015Q3 branch is cut just a few hours ago which carried this fix, and 2015Q2 is no longer supported, so I would consider this as "overcome by event".
